summary: Iteration 179: Guest Commerce Flow Testing - 17/17 backend tests passed (100%), 8/8 frontend tests passed (100%). Full guest checkout flow working: add to cart, checkout without login, payment proof submission, admin visibility.

issues: Some products show TZS 0 price (data issue, not code bug)
Contains one /account/referrals link - should be public route or removed

test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!, Sales: neema.sales@konekt.demo / Sales123!
seed_data_creation: Created test guest orders and payment proofs during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest commerce flow fully verified. Key findings: (1) POST /api/public/checkout creates orders with is_guest_order=true, payment_status=pending_submission, order_status=awaiting_payment_proof, (2) Checkout returns order_number, bank_details, and account_info (create_account or login type), (3) Checkout validates required fields (customer_name, email, phone, items), (4) Checkout detects ACTIVE accounts by email and sets linked_user_id + account_link_status=linked, (5) POST /api/public/payment-proof creates payment_proof_submissions with is_guest_submission=true, (6) Payment proof updates order to pending_review/awaiting_payment_verification, (7) Payment proof validates order_number and email match, (8) Guest payment proofs appear in admin queue at GET /api/payment-proofs/admin?status=pending, (9) Guest orders appear in admin orders list at GET /api/admin/orders, (10) Public marketplace shows 'Add to Cart' buttons on all product cards, (11) Cart icon with badge in navbar, (12) /cart page shows items with quantity controls and 'Proceed to Checkout', (13) /checkout page has contact form, delivery fields, order summary, and 'Place Order' button, (14) /payment-proof page has all required fields, (15) Product detail page shows 'Add to Cart' button (NOT 'Order Now'), (16) Unauthenticated /account/* access redirects to /login, (17) No /account/* links in public navbar.
